# mcp-enforce

> Canonical authorization-enforcement library for Harne8 MCP servers (ADR-004, ADR-021):
> per-call OPA policy gate (default-deny), allow/deny auditor, and shared request-extraction
> helpers. Stdlib only; one network dependency (OPA REST). Module:
> github.com/harne8/mcp-enforce, package mcpenforce.

## Why this module exists

The policy/audit gate was duplicated between pose-mcp and graphforge/mcp-server and had begun to
diverge (RequirePrincipal and audit-on-allow existed only in pose-mcp). This is the single
implementation, consumed in-process by Harne8-org Go servers and embedded in the enforcement
sidecar that fronts foreign servers. Same code in both modes = consistency required by ADR-004.

## Core types

- PolicyGate / NewPolicyGate(PolicyConfig): the gate. Evaluate(ctx, PolicyInput) →
  (PolicyDecision, error). Order: RequirePrincipal (deny anonymous) → dev allow-all when OPAURL
  empty → OPA REST → default-deny on any error.
- PolicyConfig{OPAURL, OPAPath, Timeout, RequirePrincipal, HTTPClient}. Zero value = dev allow-all.
- PolicyInput{Principal, ProjectID, Method, ToolName} plus inert ADR-007 fields {Scopes []string,
  RunID string, ExpiresAt time.Time} — serialized to OPA only when set; no Rego evaluates them yet.
- PolicyDecision{Allow, Principal, ProjectID, ToolName, Violations}; Metadata() → map for JSON-RPC
  error data and audit. DenyDecision(input, reason) builds a denied decision.

## Auditing

- Auditor interface: Record(ctx, PolicyDecision). Never logs payload content.
- SlogAuditor(logger, component): allow → Info "policy allowed" event_type=policy.decided; deny →
  Warn "policy denied" event_type=policy.violation. NopAuditor discards.

## Execution Identity (ADR-007)

- Identity{RunID, ProjectID, Scopes, PolicyVersion, ExpiresAt}: conductor-issued, run-bound,
  time-boxed. MintToken(id, secret)/ParseToken(token, secret): compact HMAC-SHA256 token
  "base64url(claims).base64url(sig)" (stdlib only; symmetric secret = V1 backend, SPIFFE = upgrade).
- IdentityFromHeader(h, secret): reads/verifies the X-MCP-Execution-Identity header; (nil,nil) when
  absent, error when present-but-invalid. id.Apply(input) binds RunID/Scopes/ExpiresAt onto PolicyInput.
- Gate enforcement: RequireIdentity → deny missing_identity; time-box → deny identity_expired when
  ExpiresAt past (PolicyConfig.Clock injectable). Scopes/run_id/expires_at flow into the OPA input doc.

## Extraction helpers

- PrincipalFromHeader(h): X-MCP-Principal then X-Principal. HeaderValue(h, names...).
- ProjectIDFromArguments(rawJSON): reads project_id from tools/call arguments.
- ConfigFromEnv(prefix, defaultOPAPath): reads <prefix>OPA_URL/OPA_PATH/OPA_TIMEOUT(seconds)/
  REQUIRE_PRINCIPAL. Example: ConfigFromEnv("POSE_MCP_", "pose/mcp/allow").

## Contracts (golden-pinned)

- testdata/opa_input_minimal.json — base OPA input doc (unchanged wire).
- testdata/opa_input_with_scope.json — with ADR-007 scope fields.
- testdata/audit_events.jsonl — audit event schema (allow + deny).
- Regenerate: MCP_ENFORCE_UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 go test ./...

## Consumers (planned)

- pose-mcp-enforce-adopt: pose-mcp imports this, deletes internal/mcpserver/policy.go.
- graphforge-mcp-enforce-sidecar: sidecar embeds this in front of graphforge/mcp-server.
- mcp-execution-identity-scope-binding: activates the inert scope fields (ADR-007).
